query_text: a ski that feels alive underfoot

results.explanation: Black Crows Atris excels in: playfulness. Review: "More playful than heavy titanal powder skis." Review: "Playfulness is incredible, you can butter and smear everywhere."
Blizzard Rustler 10 excels in: playfulness. Review: "Incredibly playful — you can butter, spin, and smear with ease." Review: "Pure fun machine."
Armada ARV 106 excels in: playfulness. Review: "Most playful ski I've ever been on — butters, spins, everything feels easy." Review: "Playful factor is off the charts."
DPS Pagoda Tour 112 RP excels in: playfulness. Review: "Extremely playful and surfy in powder." Review: "Very playful and surfy in powder."

Faction Dictator 3.0 excels in: playfulness. Review: "Very playful — great for butters, natural features, and creative skiing." Review: "The playfulness is addictive — you start looking for features to hit on every run."

Moment Wildcat 108 excels in: playfulness. Review: "The maple/triax construction gives it a unique blend of power and playfulness." Review: "More chargy than the Atris but more playful than the Mindbender."
Head Easy Joy SLR excels in: playfulness. Review: "Perfect for beginners." Review: "The most user-friendly ski I've ever tried."
Dynastar M-Free 108 excels in: playfulness. Review: "more playful." Review: "The playfulness is nice — lets you throw in some style."
K2 Disruption 78C excels in: playfulness. Review: "Perfect ski for my level." Review: "easy to turn"
Salomon QST 106 excels in: playfulness. Review: "Playful enough for drops and airs." Review: "Damp, playful, floaty."

ground_truth.reason: Reviewer literally says 'feels alive underfoot', maple core described as springy and engaging
Maple core described as lively and snappy, engaging carving feel
Reviews emphasize fun and lively feel
Poppy, energetic feel from ash/poplar core
